title: Pokéball Spawner
description: this resource pack replaces the spawner with pokeball
body:
![Pokéball Spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcd96fd6b4a549947967b76eed863478fcd1c6a9_0.webp)


![sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) 
**This resource pack replaces all spawners with Poké Balls from the Pokémon franchise, as  well as changing the Vault and its keys**
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7345723e7ea8ab35d42238889c9463bedaf33238.png)
![sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png) **what's he doing!**
- It changes everything for a spawner
- modifies the entire Vault
- changes the keys for the vaults

 ![sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb388e192264a955a6b0eb6d8a82a39b8a34ea.png) **Important note**

This resource pack uses the new model rotation improvements that were added in version **1.21.6**
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)


![text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08e762aa1256f1b545fe817078135c546fd26200.png)
